creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
I haven't test build this, but I see there are some obvious problems.
If you can't run Poudriere then you can set DEVELOPER=yes in /etc/make.conf
to get some QA warnings anyway.

You're missing some LIB_DEPENDS on devel/llmv40 at the very least.

X.include <bsd.port.options.mk>

Like Richard already said, this line isn't necessary.

XPORTVERSION=	0.4.0

devel/efl was updated a while ago, so can't this be updated too now?
